mean_en: any infectious disease that kills a lot of people; a disease spread by rats that causes fever, swellings on the body and usually death
sentence: The Black Plague took thousands of lives away in the Middle Ages.
sentence_trans: 在中世纪，黑死病夺走了成千上万条生命。
word_etyma: plag击打 + ue  → 击打（使苦恼） → plague烦扰
